baseline_plateau.note: PR 3 (v1.10.0) repo-native plateau — same corpus, with usage harvest

after_catalog_load.note: v1.11.0 — after sqlcg catalog load columns.csv (144,311 cols / 5,673 tables)

contradicted_by_source_split.note: Contradicted edges split by catalog source of the dst table

ddl_sourced_tables.interpretation: Parser positional guesses where dst column name is wrong. These are the real parser bugs (parser emits a wrong column name for the dst).

information_schema_sourced_tables.interpretation: Export drift — the INFORMATION_SCHEMA CSV is stale vs. the graph. Refresh the CSV to reduce. Low count as expected.

usage_sourced_tables.interpretation: Usage-derived catalog has different column names than the graph edges. Likely a combination of column renames or different src/dst column mappings.

other.interpretation: Edges where dst table is in SqlTable but category resolution gave 'other'. Orphan or NULL-source tables.

contradicted_by_source_split.rubric: contradicted on ddl-sourced tables = parser guess-bugs. contradicted on information_schema-sourced tables = export drift (refresh CSV). The XML-DDL cohort (da.*/ba.* old tables) shows only 12 contradicted — matches expectation that old tables don't change (recent changes would be in .sql changelogs).

index_profile_delta.note: Index wall time with catalog re-apply NOT configured (two-step workflow). Index path is untouched — no parse-time work added.
